steps.title: Identify two points on the line
steps.content: From the graph, read two clear lattice points the line passes through. Use them to compute the slope and check which equation fits in standard form.

steps.title: Test the equations
steps.content:
Plugging the graph's points into $35x - 49y = -126$ produces a true statement, and the slope $\frac{35}{49} = \frac{5}{7}$ matches the line's rise/run. The other choices either have the wrong slope or fail at the points.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
